seo.title: About HeartLink | Gopi Shah
seo.description: Meet Gopi Shah and the HeartLink team behind private matchmaking for select Indian families.

hero.title: A trusted team for serious families.
hero.description: HeartLink is led by Gopi Shah, with a strong focus on privacy, family background and long-term compatibility.

trustHeading.title: A public record behind the private work.
trustHeading.description: HeartLink's credibility is built on years of community service, cultural leadership and careful matrimonial guidance.

trustFeature.title: Community work that built real trust.
paragraphs: Through Jwala, Gopi Shah has supported women-focused and humanitarian initiatives across India.
This work reflects the same values HeartLink follows today: dignity, privacy, respect and responsibility.

curators.name: Gopi Shah
curators.title: Gopi Shah personally guides the HeartLink process.
curators.lead: Gopi Shah has worked across India and the United States in culture, community work and matrimonial service.
paragraphs: Her background includes Home Science from MS University of Baroda, creative direction, Indian craft work and cultural projects across Mumbai, Chicago and Florida.
She has coordinated major cultural work, including a performance at the Great Wall of China, and has received the Dr. Sarojini Naidu International Award.
Before HeartLink, she ran Jeevansathi as an honorary matrimonial service for five years. That experience shaped HeartLink's private, careful and family-first approach.

credentials.title: Trusted

curators.name: Alpa Apoorva
curators.title: A good match also needs emotional understanding.
curators.lead: Alpa Apoorva brings relationship coaching and emotional guidance to the HeartLink process.
paragraphs: Alpa is an emotional therapist, certified relationship coach and transformation coach.
She helps individuals and families speak clearly about expectations, values, responsibilities and comfort before marriage.
This support helps families move with more clarity, especially when two good families are still learning how to understand each other.

credentials.title: Balanced
credentials.description: Support for individuals, couples and families

proofHeading.title: Experience beyond matchmaking.
